name: Voyage across Belegaer
text: You are playing Campaign Mode.  Setup: Each player chooses a Modification boon for each of their ship-objectives and attaches it to that ship-objective. For each ship-objective, its controller may deal 2 damage to it to add 1 resource to a hero's resource pool. Shuffle Ominous Fate and Thunderstruck into the encounter deck. Shuffle Crowley into the Corsair deck.

name: Voyage across Belegaer
text: Resolution: Add Ominous Fate to the Campaign Pool.  Gain the following:  • 1 XP for each surviving player.  • 1 XP if 4 stage 2B quest cards are in the victory display.  • 1 XP if you ended the game on-course.  • 1 XP if no Ship enemies are in play.  • 1 XP for each Corsair Warship in the victory display.  • 1 XP if Crowley is in the victory display.  • 2 XP if Thunderstruck is in the victory display.  • –1 XP if Ominous Fate is in the victory display.

name: Dream-chaser
keywords: Immune to player card effects. Sentinel.
text: The Dream-chaser can always be committed to Sailing tests (even if you are not the first player), and counts as 2 characters when committed to a Sailing test.   If the Dream-chaser is destroyed, the players lose the game.

name: Dream-chaser
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Immune to player card effects. Sentinel.
text: The Dream-chaser can always be committed to Sailing tests and counts as 3 characters when committed to a Sailing test.   If the Dream-chaser is destroyed, the players lose the game.

name: Dawn Star
keywords: Immune to player card effects. Sentinel.
text: Raise your starting threat by 3. Draw 1 additional card during the resource phase. If the Dawn Star is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Dawn Star
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Immune to player card effects. Sentinel.
text: Draw 1 additional card during the resource phase. If the Dawn Star is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Duskbringer
keywords: Immune to player card effects. Sentinel.
text: Response: After you play a card with an odd printed cost, add 1 resource to a hero's resource pool. (Limit once per round.)  If the Duskbringer is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Duskbringer
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Immune to player card effects. Sentinel.
text: Response: After you play a card with an odd printed cost, add 1 resource to a hero's resource pool. (Limit twice per round.)  If the Duskbringer is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Glorinaith
keywords: Immune to player card effects. Ranged. Sentinel.
text: Action: Discard the top 2 cards of any deck to deal 1 damage to an engaged non-unique enemy. (Limit once per round.)  If the Glorinaith is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Glorinaith
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Immune to player card effects. Ranged. Sentinel.
text: Action: Name a card. Discard the top 3 cards of any deck to deal 1 damage to an engaged non-unique enemy (2 damage instead if the named card is discarded this way). (Limit once per round.)  If the Glorinaith is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Narelenya
keywords: Immune to player card effects. Sentinel.
text: Reduce the cost of the first ally you play each round by 1.  If Narelenya is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Narelenya
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Immune to player card effects. Sentinel.
text: Reduce the cost of the first card you play each round by 1.  If Narelenya is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Silver Wing
keywords: Immune to player card effects. Sentinel. Ranged.
text: Reduce your starting threat by 3. Each hero you control gets +1 [attack]. If the Silver Wing is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Silver Wing
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Immune to player card effects. Sentinel. Ranged.
text: Reduce your starting threat by 6. Each hero you control gets +1 [attack]. If the Silver Wing is destroyed, its controller is eliminated from the game.

name: Armor Plating
text: When Armor Plating leaves play, remove it from the game.  Attached Ship gets +1 [defense].

name: Armor Plating
text: When Armor Plating leaves play, remove it from the game.  Attached Ship gets +1 [defense].  Response: After attached Ship defends against an enemy, discard 1 shadow card from another enemy.

name: Ballista
text: When Ballista leaves play, remove it from the game.  Attached Ship gets +1 [attack].

name: Ballista
text: When Ballista leaves play, remove it from the game.  Attached Ship gets +1 [attack] and gains ranged.  Response: After attached Ship attacks, deal 1 damage to a non-unique enemy and remove 1 resource from that enemy.

name: Enlarged Quarters
text: When Enlarged Quarters leaves play, remove it from the game.  Attached Ship gets +3 hit points and can be committed to any Sailing test.

name: Enlarged Quarters
text: When Enlarged Quarters leaves play, remove it from the game.  Attached Ship gets +3 hit points and can be committed to any Sailing test. It counts as 1 additional character when committed to a Sailing test.

name: Extra Sails
text: When Extra Sails leaves play, remove it from the game.  Attached Ship gets +1 [willpower].

name: Extra Sails
text: When Extra Sails leaves play, remove it from the game.  Attached Ship gets +1 [willpower].  Response: When a non-unique Ship enemy engages you, spend 1 resource and exhaust Extra Sails to reduce that enemy's Boarding value by 1.

name: Ominous Fate
keywords: Surge. Ominous Fate cannot be canceled.
text: When Revealed: Each player must either reveal an encounter card, raise their threat by X, or deal X damage divided among characters they control. X is the campaign card's part number. The players may add Ominous Fate to the victory display.

name: Thunderstruck
keywords: Archery 1. Boarding 2. Immune to player card effects.
text: Thunderstruck gets +2 hit points per player and cannot take more than 4 damage each round.
shadow: Shadow: Either add Thunderstruck to the staging area or deal 2 damage to the defending character.

name: Crowley
text: For each resource on Crowley, he gets +1 [threat], +1 [attack], +1 [defense], and +1 hit points. If Crowley has 3 or more resources on him, he gains victory 3.  Forced: When Crowley engages you, place 1 resource on him. At the end of the combat phase, return him to the staging area.

name: The Fate of Numenor
keywords: You are playing Campaign Mode.
text: Setup: Attach Spyglass to Calphon. Shuffle Revenant into the encounter deck. For each character in play, its controller may deal 1 damage to it to reduce their threat by 1.

name: The Fate of Numenor
text: Resolution: Gain the following:  • 1 XP for each surviving player.  • 1 XP for each Lush Jungle and Drowned Graves in the victory display.  • 1 XP for each resource on this card (to a maximum of 3 XP).  • 1 XP if each surviving player's threat is 40 or less.  • –1 XP if Ominous Fate is in the victory display.

name: Calphon
keywords: The first player gains control of Calphon.
text: Action: Exhaust Calphon to look at the bottom card of your deck. Then, you may switch that card with a card in your hand.  If Calphon leaves play, the players lose.

name: Calphon
keywords: Campaign Mode only. The first player gains control of Calphon.
text: Action: Exhaust Calphon to look at the bottom 5 card of your deck. Then, you may switch one of them with a card in your hand.  If Calphon leaves play, the players lose.

name: Spyglass
keywords: When Spyglass leaves play, remove it from the game.
text: Action: Exhaust Spyglass to choose one:  • Look at a shadow card.  • Look at the top and bottom card of your deck.  • Place 1 progress on a location (2 progress instead if it is Uncharted).

name: Spyglass
keywords: When Spyglass leaves play, remove it from the game.
text: Action: Exhaust Spyglass to choose one:  • Look at a shadow card. You may discard it.  • Look at the top and bottom card of any deck.  • Place 1 progress on a location (4 progress instead if it is Uncharted).

name: Revenant
keywords: Immune to card effects. Revenant gets +2 [attack] and +2 [defense] for each resource on the campaign card.
text: Forced: When 3 or more damage would be placed on Revenant, place 2 damage instead.   Forced: After Revenant is destroyed, shuffle it into the encounter deck. Place 1 resource on the campaign card.

name: Raid on the Grey Havens
keywords: You are playing Campaign Mode.
text: Setup: The first player takes control of Calphon and attaches Spyglass and Black Key (boon) to him. Shuffle Graxar into the encounter deck. Each player may choose one copy of Galdor's Counsel and add it to their hand. For this game, X is plus 1 for each of those copies.   Forced: After stage 2B is revealed, remove Calphon and each attachment on him from the game, ignoring his “leaves play” ability.

name: Raid on the Grey Havens
text: Resolution: If Graxar is in the victory display, choose either Parrying Cutlass or Throwing Axe, add it to the Campaign Pool, and record which hero you attach it to.  Add the copies of Galdor's Counsel chosen during setup to the Campaign Pool.  Gain the following:  • 1 XP for each surviving player.  • 1 XP if 2 or fewer cards are underneath The Havens Burn (2 XP instead if no cards are underneath it).  • 1 XP for each Elven Wave-runner in the victory display.  • 1 XP if Na'asiyah is in the victory display.  • 1 XP if no enemies are in play.  • 1 XP if each surviving player's threat is 40 or less.  • –1 XP if Ominous Fate is in the victory display.

name: Black Key
keywords: When Black Key leaves play, remove it from the game.
text: Attached character gets +1 [willpower], +1 [attack], and +1 [defense].

name: Black Key
keywords: When Black Key leaves play, remove it from the game.
text: Attached character gets +1 [willpower], +1 [attack], and +1 [defense].  Response: After attached character quests successfully, place 1 resource on them.  Action: Exhaust Black Key and remove 3 resources from attached character to ready them.

name: Galdor's Counsel
text: Action: Add X resources to any hero's resource pool. X is half the level of Galdor's Counsel ([leadership]), rounded up. Add Galdor's Counsel to the victory display.

name: Galdor's Counsel
text: Action: Deal X damage to a non-unique enemy. X is the level of Galdor's Counsel ([tactics]). Add Galdor's Counsel to the victory display.

name: Galdor's Counsel
text: Action: Place X progress on a non-unique location in the staging area. X is the level of Galdor's Counsel ([spirit]). Add Galdor's Counsel to the victory display.

name: Galdor's Counsel
text: Action: Look at the top X or bottom X cards of your deck, add any number of them to your hand, and put the rest on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order. X is half the level of Galdor's Counsel ([lore]), rounded up. Add Galdor's Counsel to the victory display.

name: Graxar
keywords: Immune to card effects. No more than 1 character can attack Graxar each round.
text: Graxar gets +1 [attack] for each damage on him and +1 [defense] for each resource on him.  Forced: When Graxar is dealt a shadow card, place 1 resource on him.

name: Parrying Cutlass
keywords: Permanent. Restricted.
text: Attached hero gets +1 [defense] (+2 [defense] instead if it has 2 or more resources in its resource pool).

name: Parrying Cutlass
keywords: Permanent. Restricted.
text: Attached hero gets +2 [defense] (+3 [defense] instead if it has 2 or more resources in its resource pool). Response: When attached hero defends against an enemy, exhaust Parrying Cutlass to move 1 resource from that enemy to attached hero's resource pool.

name: Throwing Axe
keywords: Permanent. Restricted.
text: Attached hero gets +1 [attack] (+2 [attack] instead if it has 2 or more damage on it).

name: Throwing Axe
keywords: Permanent. Restricted.
text: Attached hero gets +2 [attack] (+3 [attack] instead if it has 2 or more damage on it). Action: Either deal 1 damage to an enemy, or toss Throwing Axe. If it travels at least two feet across the playing area and stops on any enemies, deal 4 damage to one of them. Reattach Throwing Axe to its hero. (Limit once per game.)

name: Flight of the Stormcaller
keywords: You are playing Campaign Mode.
text: Setup: Flip the Stormcaller to its “Campaign Mode only” side, then attach Black Key (burden) to it. Each player chooses a Modification boon for each of their ship- objectives and attaches it to that ship-objective. Shuffle Thunderstruck into the encounter deck. Shuffle Crowley into the Corsair deck. Put Calaerion into play under the control of the player with the Dream-chaser.

name: Flight of the Stormcaller
text: Resolution: Gain the following:  • 1 XP for each surviving player.  • 1 XP if you ended the game on-course.  • 1 XP if you ended the game on stage 2B.  • 2 XP if you destroyed the Stormcaller.  • 1 XP if Crowley is in the victory display.  • 2 XP if Thunderstruck is in the victory display.  • 1 XP if each hero has no damage on it.  • –1 XP if Ominous Fate is in the victory display.

name: Stormcaller
keywords: Boarding 2. Cannot have player attachments.
text: When the Stormcaller advances to the next quest stage, return it to the Stormcaller's area.  If the Stormcaller leaves play, the players win the game.

name: Stormcaller
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Boarding 2.
text: If you are at the Stormcaller's stage, no more than 9 progress can be placed on your quest each round.  When the Stormcaller advances to the next quest stage, return it to the Stormcaller's area.  If the Stormcaller leaves play, the players win the game.

name: Black Key
keywords: When Black Key leaves play, remove it from the game.
text: Attached enemy gets +1 [threat], +1 [attack], +1 [defense], and gains immune to player card effects.  Forced: At the end of the quest phase, if Captain Sahír is in play, place 1 resource on him for each player in the game.

name: Black Key
keywords: When Black Key leaves play, remove it from the game.
text: Attached enemy gets +1 [threat], +1 [attack], +1 [defense], and gains immune to player card effects.

name: Calaerion
keywords: When Calaerion leaves play, remove him from the game.
text: Action: Spend 3 resources and exhaust Calaerion to ready the Dream-chaser and give it +1 [willpower], +1 [attack], and +1 [defense] until the end of the phase.

name: Calaerion
keywords: When Calaerion leaves play, remove him from the game.
text: Response: After a card is discarded from the encounter deck, shuffle it into that deck. (Limit once per round.)  Action: Spend 2 resources and exhaust Calaerion to ready another ally and give it +1 [willpower], +1 [attack], and +1 [defense] until the end of the round.

name: The Thing in the Depths
keywords: You are playing Campaign Mode.
text: Forced: After Captain Sahír (enemy) enters play, attach Black Key (burden) to him.  Forced: After Captain Sahír flips over, remove Black Key (burden) from the game and attach Black Key (boon) to him. Add Sea Serpent (Menacing side) to the staging area. One player adds Come Together to their hand. For this game, X is plus 1 for Come Together.

name: The Thing in the Depths
text: Resolution: The players may add Come Together to the Campaign Pool.  Gain the following:  • 1 XP for each surviving player.  • 1 XP if Captain Sahír has 5 or more resources.  • 1 XP if Na'asiyah has 5 or more resources.  • 1 XP if Sea Serpent (Enraged side) is in play (2 XP instead if it is in the victory display).  • 1 XP if each hero has no damage on it.  • 1 XP if each surviving player's threat is 40 or less (2 XP instead if their threat is 30 or less).  • –1 XP if Ominous Fate is in the victory display.

name: Come Together
text: Action: Choose up to X characters. X is the level of Come Together, then add it to the victory display. Until the end of the round, each of those characters...  ...get +2 [defense] if you control a [leadership] hero.  ...get +2 [attack] if you control a [tactics] hero.  ...get +2 [willpower] if you control a [spirit] hero.  ...gain a Trait of your choice and heal 2 damage from each of them if you control a [lore] hero

name: The Thing in the Depths
keywords: Immune to player card effects. Cannot be engaged.
text: The Thing in the Depths gets +3 hit points per player. Forced: When a Creature enemy is destroyed, deal damage to The Thing in the Depths equal to that enemy's [threat].

name: The Thing in the Depths
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Immune to player card effects. Cannot be engaged.
text: The Thing in the Depths gets +3 hit points per player. Forced: When a Creature enemy is destroyed, deal 2 damage to The Thing in the Depths.

name: Sea Serpent
keywords: Immune to player card effects. X is the number of players in the game.
text: Forced: After Sea Serpent attacks and destroys an ally, the defending player deals X damage divided among characters they control.  Forced: After Sea Serpent is destroyed, flip it over and put it into play in the staging area.

name: Sea Serpent
keywords: Immune to player card effects. X is twice the number of players in the game.
text: Forced: After Sea Serpent attacks and destroys an ally, the defending player deals X damage divided among characters they control.  Forced: At the end of the round, Sea Serpent makes an attack against the first player.

name: Temple of the Deceived
keywords: You are playing Campaign Mode.
text: Setup: Attach Black Key (boon) to Captain Sahír. Shuffle Revenant into the encounter deck. Shuffle Starla and both Recurring Nightmares together and place one facedown under each Temple of the Deceived location, as secrets. For each character in play, its controller may deal 1 damage to it to reduce their threat by 1. One player may raise their threat by 4 to attach Spyglass to a hero.  Travel Action: Flip over a secret at your location. If it is a Recurring Nightmare, it engages you. If it is Starla, you gain control of her (ready).

name: Temple of the Deceived
text: Resolution: If Starla is under a player's control, add her to the Campaign Pool. For each Recurring Nightmare that is not a secret, add it to the Campaign Pool and choose a player. For the remainder of the campaign, that player shuffles that Recurring Nightmare into their deck after they draw their starting hand.  Gain the following:  • 1 XP for each surviving player.  • 1 XP for each resource on this card (to a maximum of 3 XP).  • 1 XP for each faceup Temple Halls.  • 1 XP if 4 or fewer Uncharted locations are faceup.  • 1 XP if Temple Guardian is in the victory display.  • 1 XP if each surviving player's threat is 40 or less.  • –1 XP if Ominous Fate is in the victory display.

name: Temple Guardian
keywords: X is the number of players in the game. Immune to player card effects. Cannot be optionally engaged.
text: Temple Guardian gets –50 engagement cost while Cursed Temple is the active location.

name: Temple Guardian
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Archery X. X is the number of players in the game. Immune to player card effects. Cannot be optionally engaged.
text: Temple Guardian gets –50 engagement cost while Cursed Temple is the active location.

name: Gate Key
text: If unattached, return Gate Key to the staging area and it gains: "Action: Exhaust a hero to claim Gate Key and attach it to that hero." Action: Exhaust Gate Key and attached hero and spend 3 resources from attached hero's resource pool to look at the facedown side of a Temple of the Deceived location.

name: Gate Key
keywords: Campaign Mode only.
text: If unattached, return Gate Key to the staging area and it gains: "Action: Exhaust a hero to claim Gate Key and attach it to that hero." Action: Exhaust Gate Key and attached hero to look at the facedown side of a Temple of the Deceived location or secret.

name: Starla
keywords: X is half the level of Starla, rounded up.
text: Response: After Starla is discarded from your hand or deck, play her.  Response: After Starla exhausts, place 1 progress on a location.

name: Recurring Nightmare
keywords: X is the number of players in the game.
text: When Recurring Nightmare leaves play, shuffle it into any player's deck.  Forced: When Recurring Nightmare enters your hand, add it to the staging area.

name: The Drowned Ruins
keywords: You are playing Campaign Mode.
text: Setup: Attach Black Key (boon) to Captain Sahír. Shuffle Revenant into the encounter deck. Each player may choose one copy of Command and add it to their hand. For this game, X is plus 1 for each of those copies.  One player may choose one copy of Círdan's Blessing and add it to their hand. For each character in play, its controller may deal 1 damage to it to reduce their threat by 1.

name: The Drowned Ruins
text: Resolution: Add each copy of Command and Círdan's Blessing chosen during setup to the Campaign Pool.  Gain the following:  • 1 XP for each surviving player.  • 1 XP for each resource on this card (to a maximum of 3 XP).  • 1 XP if Na'asiyah has 5 or more resources.  • 1 XP if no enemies are in play.  • 1 XP if 5 or more Underwater locations are in the victory display.  • 2 XP if Shrine to Morgoth (Grotto side) is in the victory display.  • 1 XP if each surviving player's threat is 40 or less.  • –1 XP if Ominous Fate is in the victory display.

name: Command
text: Action: Add Command ([leadership]) to the victory display to choose up to X options, where X is its level:  • A hero gets +2 [defense] until the end of the round.  • An enemy gets –2 [defense] until the end of the round.  • Ready a character with Círdan's Blessing on it.  • Put an ally with cost X or less in your discard pile into play. Discard it at the end of the phase.

name: Command
text: Action: Add Command ([lore]) to the victory display to choose up to X options, where X is its level:  • Remove X resources from a non-unique enemy.  • Add 2 resources to each Círdan's Blessing.  • Add the bottom card of your deck to your hand.  • Look at the top 10 cards of the encounter deck, discard any number of them, and shuffle it.

name: Command
text: Action: Add Command ([spirit]) to the victory display to choose up to X options, where X is its level:  • A hero gets +2 [willpower] until the end of the round.  • Each character with Círdan's Blessing on it does not exhaust to commit to a quest this round.  • Place 2 progress on a non-unique location.  • Put Spyglass into play attached to a hero.

name: Command
text: Action: Add Command ([tactics]) to the victory display to choose up to X options, where X is its level:   A hero gets +2 [attack] until the end of the round.  • An enemy gets –2 [attack] until the end of the round.  • Deal 2 damage to an enemy. You may engage it.  • Ready an attachment. You may move it to an eligible character.

name: Cirdan's Blessing
keywords: Attach to a character.
text: Cirdan's Blessing enters play with X resources on it. X is 1 more than the level of Círdan's Blessing ([leadership]).  Response: When attached character defends, remove 1 resource from Cirdan's Blessing to give that character +3 [defense] for this attack.

name: Cirdan's Blessing
keywords: Attach to a character.
text: Cirdan's Blessing enters play with X resources on it. X is 1 more than the level of Círdan's Blessing ([tactics]).  Response: When attached character attacks, remove 1 resource from Cirdan's Blessing to give that character +3 [attack] for this attack.

name: Cirdan's Blessing
keywords: Attach to a character.
text: Cirdan's Blessing enters play with X resources on it. X is 1 more than the level of Círdan's Blessing ([spirit]).  Action: Exhaust Cirdan's Blessing and remove 1 resource from it to give attached character +3 [willpower] until the end of the phase.

name: Cirdan's Blessing
keywords: Attach to a character.
text: Cirdan's Blessing enters play with X resources on it. X is 1 more than the level of Círdan's Blessing ([lore]).  Response: After the active location is explored, move 1 resource from Cirdan's Blessing to attached hero's resource pool. Then, heal 1 damage from attached hero.

name: A Storm on Cobas Haven
keywords: You are playing Campaign Mode.
text: Setup: Attach Black Key (burden) to Raider Flagship. Each player chooses a Modification boon for each of their ship-objectives and attaches it to that ship-objective. Shuffle Thunderstruck into the encounter deck. Shuffle Crowley into the Corsair deck.  Put Calaerion into play under the control of the player with the Dream-chaser. Put Gavin into play under any player's control. One player may choose a copy of Círdan's Blessing not in the Campaign Pool and add it to their hand.

name: A Storm on Cobas Haven
text: Resolution: Add the Círdan's Blessing chosen during setup to the Campaign Pool. The players may spend 4 XP on Gavin to record in the Campaign Log that “Gavin returned.”  Gain the following:  • 1 XP for each surviving player.  • 1 XP if you ended the game on-course.  • 1 XP if 2 Dol Amroth Warships are in play.  • 1 XP if the players control 2 Corsair Skirmishers.  • 1 XP if the players control 4 Dol Amroth objectives.  • 1 XP for each Corsair Warship in the victory display.  • 1 XP if Crowley is in the victory display.  • 2 XP if Raider Flagship is in the victory display.  • 2 XP if Thunderstruck is in the victory display.  • –1 XP if Ominous Fate is in the victory display.

name: Dol Amroth Warship
keywords: Immune to player card effects.
text: If you are on-course, Dol Amroth Warship gets +2 [willpower], +2 [attack], and +2 [defense].  Forced: When Dol Amroth Warship is destroyed, set it aside, out of play.

name: Dol Amroth Warship
keywords: Campaign Mode only. Immune to player card effects. Sentinel.
text: If you are on-course, Dol Amroth Warship gets +2 [willpower], +2 [attack], and +2 [defense].  Forced: When Dol Amroth Warship is destroyed, set it aside, out of play.

name: Gavin
keywords: Surge. Ranged. When Gavin leaves play (other than by his ability), remove him from the game.
text: Planning Action: Shuffle Gavin and 1 random set-aside Send for Help into the encounter deck.  When Revealed: Put Gavin into play under any player's control committed to the quest. Add 1 resource to Lanwyn's resource pool, if able.

name: Send for Help
keywords: Surge.
text: When Revealed: Choose a player to search the top 10 cards of their deck for a card, draw it or play it at no cost, and shuffle their deck. If Send for Help ([leadership]) is upgraded, repeat this effect. Remove Send for Help from the game.
shadow: Shadow: Resolve this card's when revealed effect.

name: Send for Help
keywords: Surge.
text: When Revealed: Search the players' collections for a hero and put it into play under any player's control. If Send for Help ([tactics]) is upgraded, repeat this effect. At the end of the round, or if those heroes leave play, remove them from the game. Remove Send for Help from the game.
shadow: Shadow: Resolve this card's when revealed effect.

name: Send for Help
keywords: Surge.
text: When Revealed: Choose one: resource, planning, combat, or refresh. After the current phase, there is an additional instance of the chosen phase. If Send for Help ([spirit]) is upgraded, choose two instead (resolve them in any order). Remove Send for Help from the game.
shadow: Shadow: Resolve this card's when revealed effect.

name: Send for Help
keywords: Surge.
text: When Revealed: Search the players' collections for Gandalf ally (core set 73) and put him into play under any player's control, ignoring uniqueness. If Send for Help ([lore]) is upgraded, that player chooses up to 3 of Gandalf's options instead of 1. Remove Send for Help from the game.

name: The City of Corsairs
keywords: You are playing Campaign Mode.
text: Setup: Flip the Stormcaller to its “Campaign Mode only” side, then attach Black Key (burden) to it. Each player chooses a Modification boon for each of their ship-objectives and attaches it to that ship- objective. Shuffle Thunderstruck into the encounter deck. Shuffle Crowley into the Corsair deck.  Put Calaerion into play under the control of the player with the Dream-chaser. One player may choose a copy of Círdan's Blessing not in the Campaign Pool and add it to their hand. If “Gavin returned,” put him into play under any player's control. Flip this card over.

name: The City of Corsairs
text: Forced: When stage 2B is revealed, search the encounter deck and discard pile for each boon and non-Ship burden and shuffle them into the second encounter deck.  Forced: When Captain Sahír enters play, attach Black Key (burden) and The Black Sword to him.  Refresh Action: Exhaust a hero to move 1 resource from The Black Sword to that hero's resource pool. If The Black Sword has no resources on it, remove it from the game. (Group limit once per round.)   Resolution: The players win the campaign!  Gain the following:  • 1 XP for each surviving player.  • 1 XP for each of the following cards in the victory display: Corsair Warship, Shattered Monument, Crowley, and Stormcaller.  • 2 XP if Thunderstruck is in the victory display.  • –1 XP if Ominous Fate is in the victory display.

name: The Black Sword
keywords: Immune to player card effects. The Black Sword enters play with 3 resources on it.
text: Captain Sahír gets +2 [attack] and gains indestructible.  Forced: After Captain Sahír attacks for the first time each round, he makes an attack against each other player (in turn order).

name: The Black Sword
keywords: Immune to player card effects. The Black Sword enters play with 2 resources on it.
text: Captain Sahír gains indestructible.  Forced: After Captain Sahír attacks for the first time each round, he makes an attack against each other player (in turn order).

name: Hard Mode
text: Each player's threat cannot be reduced by more than 1 each round.  Forced: After a player draws any number of cards, that player raises their threat by that number.   Resolution: Gain 1 XP.

name: Expert Mode
text: Each player's threat cannot be reduced.  Forced: After a player draws any number of cards, that player raises their threat by that number.  Forced: After a character is healed or readied by a player card effect, its controller raises their threat by 1.   Resolution: Gain 2 XP.

name: The Shattered Monument
text: Each Raider enemy with at least 1 resource on it is immune to player events.  Forced: At the beginning of the resource phase, add 1 resource to each Raider enemy in play.
